Package pjv.controller

Class Client

java.lang.Object
pjv.controller.Client
public class Client
extends java.lang.Object
This class contains methods where new instance of Socket is created. It contains methods for sending public and private messages and methods for receiving messages from server.
Version:
1.0
Author:
Michal Pechník and Oľga Ostashchuk

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors 
    Constructor Description
    Client​(java.lang.String address, int port)
    The Client class constructor.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type Method Description
    void closeConnection()
    This method ends communication and connection with server.
    java.util.ArrayList<java.lang.String> getChatRoomNames()
    This method gets list of names of all existing chatRooms.
    java.util.ArrayList<Message> getMessages()
    This method gets list of messages sent in client's chatroom on this day, after entering the chatroom.
    boolean isCheck()
    This method gets value of check variable of Client instance.
    void loadChatRooms()
    This method loads list of chatRoom names from server.
    void loadOldMessages()
    This method loads list of old messages of chosen ChatRoom from server.
    void loadString()
    This method loads String message from server as a response to checking username in the database.
    static java.util.ArrayList<Message> parseArrayListOfMessage​(java.lang.String strList)
    This method parses String message to the ArrayList instance containing Message instances.
    static java.util.ArrayList<java.lang.String> parseArrayListOfString​(java.lang.String strList)
    This method parses String message to the ArrayList instance containing String instances.
    static Message parseMessage​(java.lang.String strMessage)
    This method parses String message to the Message instance.
    java.lang.String prepareArrayList​(java.util.ArrayList<java.lang.String> list)
    This method converts ArrayList instance to String in order to prepare it for sending to server.
    java.lang.String prepareMessage​(Message message)
    This method converts Message instance to String in order to prepare it for sending to server.
    java.util.ArrayList<Message> receiveArrayListOfMessages()
    This method receives messages sent in chosen chatRoom on this day before entering the chatRoom and parses it to ArrayList instance containing Message instances.
    java.util.ArrayList<java.lang.String> receiveArrayListOfString()
    This method receives message with chatRoom names from server and parses it to ArrayList instance containing String values.
    Message receiveMessage()
    This method receives message from server and parses it to Message instance.
    java.lang.String receiveString()
    This method receives message from server as a response to sending username.
    void sendMessage​(java.lang.String strMessage)
    This method sends String message to the server.
    void setChatRoomNames​(java.util.ArrayList chatRoomNames)
    This method sets list of names of all existing chatRooms.
    void setCheck​(boolean check)
    This method sets value of check variable of Client instance.
    void setMessages​(java.util.ArrayList<Message> messages)
    This method sets list of messages sent in client's chatroom on this day, after entering the chatroom.

    Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Constructor Details

    • Client

      public Client​(java.lang.String address, int port)
      The Client class constructor. It initializes socket with specified port number and IP address. Then it initializes incoming messages scanner and outComing messages PrintWriter.
      Parameters:
      address - String specified IP address for socket instance
      port - int specified port number for socket instance

  • Method Details

    • prepareMessage

      public java.lang.String prepareMessage​(Message message)
      This method converts Message instance to String in order to prepare it for sending to server.
      Parameters:
      message - Message to be sent by client

    • prepareArrayList

      public java.lang.String prepareArrayList​(java.util.ArrayList<java.lang.String> list)
      This method converts ArrayList instance to String in order to prepare it for sending to server.
      Parameters:
      list - ArrayList of String values to be sent by client

    • parseMessage

      public static Message parseMessage​(java.lang.String strMessage)
      This method parses String message to the Message instance.
      Parameters:
      strMessage - String message to be parsed
      Returns:
      Parsed Message instance

    • parseArrayListOfString

      public static java.util.ArrayList<java.lang.String> parseArrayListOfString​(java.lang.String strList)
      This method parses String message to the ArrayList instance containing String instances.
      Parameters:
      strList - String to be parsed
      Returns:
      Parsed Arraylist instance

    • parseArrayListOfMessage

      public static java.util.ArrayList<Message> parseArrayListOfMessage​(java.lang.String strList)
      This method parses String message to the ArrayList instance containing Message instances.
      Parameters:
      strList - String to be parsed
      Returns:
      Parsed Arraylist instance

    • sendMessage

      public void sendMessage​(java.lang.String strMessage)
      This method sends String message to the server.
      Parameters:
      strMessage - String message to be sent.

    • receiveArrayListOfString

      public java.util.ArrayList<java.lang.String> receiveArrayListOfString()
      This method receives message with chatRoom names from server and parses it to ArrayList instance containing String values.
      Returns:
      Arraylist with names of chatRooms

    • receiveArrayListOfMessages

      public java.util.ArrayList<Message> receiveArrayListOfMessages()
      This method receives messages sent in chosen chatRoom on this day before entering the chatRoom and parses it to ArrayList instance containing Message instances.
      Returns:
      ArrayList of Message instances

    • receiveMessage

      public Message receiveMessage()
      This method receives message from server and parses it to Message instance.
      Returns:
      Message instance

    • receiveString

      public java.lang.String receiveString()
      This method receives message from server as a response to sending username.
      Returns:
      String message

    • loadChatRooms

      public void loadChatRooms()
      This method loads list of chatRoom names from server.

    • loadOldMessages

      public void loadOldMessages()
      This method loads list of old messages of chosen ChatRoom from server.

    • loadString

      public void loadString()
      This method loads String message from server as a response to checking username in the database.

    • setMessages

      public void setMessages​(java.util.ArrayList<Message> messages)
      This method sets list of messages sent in client's chatroom on this day, after entering the chatroom.
      Parameters:
      messages - ArrayList list of Message instances

    • getMessages

      public java.util.ArrayList<Message> getMessages()
      This method gets list of messages sent in client's chatroom on this day, after entering the chatroom.
      Returns:
      list of Message instances

    • setChatRoomNames

      public void setChatRoomNames​(java.util.ArrayList chatRoomNames)
      This method sets list of names of all existing chatRooms.
      Parameters:
      chatRoomNames - ArrayList list of string of chatRoom names

    • getChatRoomNames

      public java.util.ArrayList<java.lang.String> getChatRoomNames()
      This method gets list of names of all existing chatRooms.
      Returns:
      list of string of chatRoom names

    • setCheck

      public void setCheck​(boolean check)
      This method sets value of check variable of Client instance.
      Parameters:
      check - boolean

    • isCheck

      public boolean isCheck()
      This method gets value of check variable of Client instance.
      Returns:
      boolean

    • closeConnection

      public void closeConnection()
      This method ends communication and connection with server.
